title: cephaelis chiapensis
intro: Cephaelis chiapensis, also known as Chiapas goldenseal, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective against various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cephaelis chiapensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and fight off bacterial and fungal infections. Cephaelis chiapensis is often used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions and infections.
